caption: A person's hand interacts with stacks of "Clearly Authentic" product boxes on a dark surface. The boxes are arranged in several neat columns, featuring white, black, and red text. In the background, a man wearing a black t-shirt and a baseball cap is visible in a small picture-in-picture window. He is seated in an office setting with a computer monitor and a white chair behind him. Overlaid on the scene is a large logo that reads "JASPYS CASEBREAKS." The logo is orange and white with a black outline. Additionally, smaller text in the inset window reads "CASEBREAKS.COM". Across the sequence, the camera angle shifts slightly, moving from a focused view of the boxed products to a wider shot that includes more of the table and the man in the overlay, while the hand continues to adjust the boxes.
